faq_postiz_gitroom_is_proudly_open_sourc: Postmill is proudly open-source! We believe in an ethical and transparent culture, meaning that Postmill will live forever. You can check out the entire code or use it for personal projects. To view the open-source repository, click here.
faq_postiz_gitroom_allows_you_to_schedul:
Postmill allows you to schedule your posts between different channels.
A channel is a publishing platform where you can schedule your posts.
For example, you can schedule your posts on X, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Reddit, Linkedin, Dribbble, Threads and Pinterest.
faq_if_you_have_a_team_with_multiple_mem: If you have a team with multiple members, you can invite them to your workspace to collaborate on your posts and add their personal channels

agent_welcome_message:
Hello, I am your Postmill agent 🙌🏻.

I can schedule a post or multiple posts to multiple channels and generate pictures and videos.

You can select the channels you want to use from the left menu.

You can see your previous conversations from the right menu.

You can also use me as an MCP Server, check Settings >> Public API

deepgram_needs_library_file: Transcription needs a file from your library
studio_azure_azure_openai_text_to_image_: Generate an image with an Azure image deployment (DALL·E / gpt-image).
studio_azure_azure_openai_landing_taglin: OpenAI image models with enterprise-grade Azure
studio_azure_azure_openai_landing_desc: Microsoft Azure's managed access to OpenAI models, including gpt-image generation — backed by Azure's enterprise security, regional deployment, and compliance controls.
studio_azure_azure_openai_landing_hl0: Image generation via OpenAI's gpt-image models
studio_azure_azure_openai_landing_hl1: Enterprise security with Entra ID & Key Vault
studio_azure_azure_openai_landing_hl3: Your prompts and data never train the models
studio_azure_azure_openai_landing_hl4: Built-in content filtering and abuse monitoring
studio_bedrock_amazon_bedrock_text_to_im: Generate an image with Amazon Titan / Nova Canvas.
studio_bedrock_amazon_bedrock_landing_ta: Build generative AI at production scale on AWS
studio_bedrock_amazon_bedrock_landing_de: AWS's fully managed service for generative-AI apps and agents, offering foundation models from leading providers — including image generation via Amazon Nova, Titan, and Stability AI.
studio_bedrock_amazon_bedrock_landing_hl: Image gen via Nova, Titan & Stability (SDXL)
One API across many foundation-model providers
Enterprise security: HIPAA, FedRAMP High, GDPR
Your data is never used to train the models
studio_black_forest_labs_black_forest_la: Generate a still image from a text prompt with FLUX.
Used by FLUX 1.1 Pro Ultra (width/height ignored for that model).
The frontier lab for visual intelligence
Creators of the FLUX model family — a frontier image lab known for state-of-the-art photorealism, precise prompt control, and production-grade character and style consistency.
Multi-image reference for style & object edits
Trusted by Adobe, Microsoft, Mistral, Freepik
studio_deepgram_deepgram_landing_desc: An enterprise voice-AI platform delivering fast, accurate real-time and batch transcription via its Nova models — known for high-accuracy, low-cost speech-to-text and captions.
studio_deepinfra_deepinfra_text_to_image: Generate an image with FLUX and other DeepInfra image models.
studio_deepinfra_deepinfra_text_to_video: Generate a video clip from a text prompt.
studio_deepinfra_deepinfra_text_to_speec: Generate a voiceover with DeepInfra TTS.
studio_deepinfra_deepinfra_landing_tagli: Run the best AI models at the lowest cost
studio_deepinfra_deepinfra_landing_desc: A developer-friendly inference hub serving 100+ models across text, image, video, and speech via simple APIs — pay-as-you-go on its own cost-optimized US infrastructure.
studio_deepinfra_deepinfra_landing_hl2: Low pay-as-you-go pricing, no hidden fees
studio_did_d_id_talking_avatar_desc: Animate a portrait image to speak your script. The clip lands in your video files.
studio_did_d_id_talking_avatar_voice_id_: Voice id for the selected provider (leave blank for the D-ID default).
studio_did_d_id_landing_desc: D-ID's Creative Reality Studio creates photorealistic talking-head videos from a single image and deploys real-time conversational avatars — turning static photos into humanlike speaking video.
studio_did_d_id_landing_hl0: Photorealistic talking avatars from one image
studio_did_d_id_landing_hl2: Batch video generation from scripts & documents
studio_did_d_id_landing_hl4: API plus PowerPoint, Canva & Slides integrations
studio_elevenlabs_elevenlabs_text_to_spe: Generate a natural voiceover from text. The clip lands in your audio files.
studio_elevenlabs_elevenlabs_landing_des: The leading AI audio platform for ultra-realistic text-to-speech, voice cloning, and multilingual dubbing across 70+ languages — known for the most natural-sounding AI voices available.
studio_elevenlabs_elevenlabs_landing_hl2: Dubbing that preserves the speaker's emotion
studio_fireworks_fireworks_ai_text_to_im: Generate an image with FLUX or Stable Diffusion on Fireworks.
studio_fireworks_fireworks_ai_landing_ta: The fastest inference for generative AI
studio_fireworks_fireworks_ai_landing_de: A high-performance inference platform serving frontier open models — including FLUX image generation — at open-source economics, processing 30T+ tokens per day.
studio_fireworks_fireworks_ai_landing_hl: Broad library of LLM, vision & image models
studio_gateway_vercel_ai_text_to_image_d: Generate an image through any gateway image model.
studio_gateway_vercel_ai_text_to_video_d: Generate a video (Veo, Kling, Wan, Seedance…). Renders may take minutes.
studio_gateway_vercel_ai_image_to_video_: Animate a source image into a video.
studio_gateway_vercel_ai_landing_tagline: One API key for hundreds of AI models
studio_gateway_vercel_ai_landing_desc: Vercel AI Gateway routes requests to hundreds of models across many providers through a single API — text, image, and video — with automatic failover and no platform markup.
studio_gateway_vercel_ai_landing_hl0: Hundreds of models from many providers
studio_gateway_vercel_ai_landing_hl1: Image generation and editing plus video
studio_gateway_vercel_ai_landing_hl3: No platform fees — pay provider rates
studio_genviral_genviral_video_desc: Generate a short-form video with Genviral Studio AI.
studio_genviral_genviral_landing_desc: Genviral Studio AI generates short-form videos from a prompt, routing to top video models (Sora, Seedance, and more). Configure your Genviral Partner API key to generate straight into your media library.
studio_google_google_ai_studio_text_to_i: Generate a still image with Nano Banana (Gemini) or Imagen on Google AI Studio.
studio_google_google_ai_studio_text_to_v: Generate a video clip from a text prompt with Google Veo on Google AI Studio.
studio_google_google_ai_studio_landing_d: Google's Gemini Developer API for media generation — spanning Nano Banana and Imagen image models plus Veo video, all driven by a single Gemini API key.
studio_google_google_ai_studio_landing_h: One Gemini API key across image and video
Simple developer API via Google AI Studio
studio_groq_groq_text_to_speech_desc: Generate a fast voiceover with Groq PlayAI / Orpheus.
studio_groq_groq_landing_tagline: Fast, low-cost AI inference on the LPU
studio_groq_groq_landing_desc: Groq runs AI inference on its purpose-built LPU chip for ultra-low latency. For speech it serves Whisper ASR and Orpheus/PlayAI TTS — real-time transcription and voice generation.
studio_hedra_hedra_character_video_desc: Generate an expressive character video from a portrait and a prompt.
studio_hedra_hedra_landing_tagline: The creative agent for character video
studio_hedra_hedra_landing_desc: A multimodal creative platform built on its proprietary Character-3 model, generating expressive character video, image, and audio — known for lifelike performance from a keyframe.
studio_hedra_hedra_landing_hl2: Infinite Canvas to combine Character-3 with others
studio_hedra_hedra_landing_hl3: Agent learns your workflow and brand elements
studio_hedra_hedra_landing_hl4: Reusable skills, web search & brand asset reuse
studio_higgsfield_higgsfield_text_to_ima: Generate a still image with Higgsfield Soul (optionally guided by a reference image).
studio_higgsfield_higgsfield_image_to_vi: Animate a source image into a video clip with Higgsfield DoP.
studio_higgsfield_higgsfield_speak_desc: Make a portrait talk in sync with an audio clip (Higgsfield Speak).
studio_higgsfield_higgsfield_landing_tag: AI-native creative suite for image & video
studio_higgsfield_higgsfield_landing_des: An AI-native creative suite that generates images, videos, and voice from text or references — Soul for image, DoP for cinematic image-to-video, and Speak for talking-video.
studio_higgsfield_higgsfield_landing_hl0: Soul image generation from text or references
studio_higgsfield_higgsfield_landing_hl3: 40+ creative tools and viral effect presets
studio_higgsfield_higgsfield_landing_hl4: Built for fast, production-grade social content
studio_ideogram_ideogram_text_to_image_d: Generate images with accurate in-image text using Ideogram 3.0.
studio_ideogram_ideogram_landing_tagline: Stunning realism, accurate text in images
studio_ideogram_ideogram_landing_desc: An AI image generator best known for industry-leading in-image text rendering — crisp, correctly-spelled typography ideal for posters, ads, and social designs.
studio_ideogram_ideogram_landing_hl1: Style References from up to 3 images
studio_ideogram_ideogram_landing_hl2: Billions of style presets and reusable codes
studio_ideogram_ideogram_landing_hl4: Built for campaigns, posters, and brand design
studio_fal_kling_text_to_video_desc: Generate a video clip from a text prompt with Kling.
studio_fal_kling_image_to_video_desc: Animate a source image into a video clip with Kling.
studio_fal_kling_landing_desc: A leading video generator by Kuaishou, known for long, cinematic clips with strong realism and physics. Recent models add native audio, voiceovers, and sound in a single pass.
studio_fal_kling_landing_hl0: Cinematic clips up to ~2 minutes at up to 1080p
studio_fal_kling_landing_hl2: Native audio: voiceovers, sound effects, ambience
studio_leonardo_leonardo_ai_text_to_imag: Generate images with Leonardo.ai across its fine-tuned model family.
studio_leonardo_leonardo_ai_landing_tagl: Generative AI for images and art
studio_leonardo_leonardo_ai_landing_desc: A creative platform powered by its foundational Phoenix model — known for high-resolution output, coherent text, and a Real-Time Canvas that turns sketches into polished art instantly.
studio_leonardo_leonardo_ai_landing_hl0: Foundational Phoenix model, native high-res output
studio_leonardo_leonardo_ai_landing_hl1: Real-Time Canvas: sketch to art instantly
studio_leonardo_leonardo_ai_landing_hl2: Strong prompt adherence and coherent text
studio_ltx_ltx_studio_text_to_video_desc: Generate a video (with synchronized audio) from a text prompt with LTX-2.
studio_ltx_ltx_studio_image_to_video_des: Animate a source image into a video clip with LTX-2.
studio_ltx_ltx_studio_audio_to_video_des: Generate visuals synchronized to an audio track (Pro models only).
studio_ltx_ltx_studio_landing_tagline: The AI platform for video production
studio_ltx_ltx_studio_landing_desc: LTX Studio by Lightricks is an end-to-end AI video production platform. Powered by the open-source LTX-2 model, it takes you from script to storyboard to finished video.
studio_ltx_ltx_studio_landing_hl2: AI storyboard generator from a script
studio_ltx_ltx_studio_landing_hl4: Timeline editing, camera control, sound design
studio_luma_luma_text_to_video_desc: Generate a video clip from a text prompt with Luma Dream Machine.
studio_luma_luma_image_to_video_desc: Animate between a start (and optional end) keyframe with Luma.
studio_luma_luma_landing_tagline: Dream Machine: ideas into video, fast
studio_luma_luma_landing_desc: Luma AI's Dream Machine turns text and images into realistic, fluid video. Its Ray models are known for natural motion, strong physics, and fast, prolific creative iteration.
studio_luma_luma_landing_hl0: Ray models for high-quality, lifelike motion
studio_luma_luma_landing_hl2: Animate still images with natural camera moves
studio_luma_luma_landing_hl3: Extend clips and build smooth transitions
studio_luma_luma_landing_hl4: Strong physics and realistic, fluid movement
studio_minimax_minimax_text_to_video_des: Generate a video clip from a text prompt with MiniMax Hailuo.
studio_minimax_minimax_text_to_video_pro: Describe the scene… Director model supports [Pan left], [Zoom in], etc.
studio_minimax_minimax_image_to_video_de: Animate a source image into a video clip with MiniMax.
studio_minimax_minimax_subject_reference: Generate a video that keeps a reference character consistent (MiniMax S2V-01).
Describe the scene with your subject…
studio_minimax_minimax_landing_desc: Hailuo, MiniMax's AI video generator, is known for striking cinematic motion and strong prompt following from text or a single image — with templates for dance, effects, and character animation.
studio_minimax_minimax_landing_hl0: Cinematic motion with strong prompt adherence
studio_minimax_minimax_landing_hl3: Image generation and audio tools alongside video
studio_minimax_minimax_landing_hl4: Fast, accessible creation for everyday creators
studio_openai_openai_gpt_image_desc: Generate a still image with gpt-image-1.
studio_openai_openai_gpt_image_backgroun: Transparent requires PNG or WebP output.
studio_openai_openai_dalle_3_desc: Generate a still image with DALL·E 3.
studio_openai_openai_text_to_speech_desc: Generate a voiceover with OpenAI TTS. The clip lands in your audio files.
studio_openai_openai_landing_tagline: The image model that powers ChatGPT
studio_openai_openai_landing_desc: OpenAI's image generation via gpt-image-1 — the natively multimodal model behind ChatGPT — delivering versatile styles, strong world knowledge, accurate text, and prompt-driven edits.
studio_openai_openai_landing_hl0: gpt-image-1 powers image generation in ChatGPT
studio_openai_openai_landing_hl2: Generate and edit existing images by prompt
studio_openrouter_openrouter_text_to_ima: Generate an image with any OpenRouter image model.
studio_openrouter_openrouter_landing_tag: One API for any AI model
studio_openrouter_openrouter_landing_des: A unified gateway to 400+ models from 70+ providers through a single OpenAI-compatible API — including a dedicated image API spanning 30+ models — with automatic failover.
studio_openrouter_openrouter_landing_hl3: OpenAI SDK works out of the box
studio_openrouter_openrouter_landing_hl4: Better prices and custom data policies
studio_fal_pika_text_to_video_desc: Generate a video clip from a text prompt with Pika 2.2.
studio_fal_pika_image_to_video_desc: Turn a source image into a dynamic video clip with Pika 2.2.
studio_fal_pika_pikaffects_desc: Apply a one-click Pika VFX to an image (cake-ify, crush, inflate, melt…).
studio_fal_pika_landing_tagline: Fun, fast AI video for everyone
studio_fal_pika_landing_desc: A playful, accessible AI video platform built around viral creation — best known for Pikaffects, one-tap surreal effects that squish, melt, or transform photos into shareable video.
studio_fal_pika_landing_hl2: Trend-based clips from selfies and audio
studio_fal_pika_landing_hl4: Designed to make creation accessible to all
studio_qwen_qwen_text_to_image_desc: Generate a still image from a text prompt with Qwen-Image.
studio_qwen_qwen_text_to_video_desc: Generate a video clip from a text prompt with Wan2.x.
studio_qwen_qwen_image_to_video_desc: Animate a source image into a video clip with Wan2.x.
studio_qwen_qwen_landing_tagline: Alibaba's Qwen image & Wan video models
studio_qwen_qwen_landing_desc: Alibaba's Qwen family, served via DashScope / Model Studio — Qwen-Image generates native 2K images from long prompts, and Wan delivers text-to-video and image-to-video.
studio_qwen_qwen_landing_hl2: Handles long prompts up to ~1,000 tokens
studio_qwen_qwen_landing_hl3: Served via DashScope / Alibaba Cloud Model Studio
studio_recraft_recraft_text_to_image_des: Generate raster or vector images, brand styles, and icons with Recraft.
studio_recraft_recraft_landing_tagline: AI design tool with visual taste
studio_recraft_recraft_landing_desc: A design-focused AI image platform best known for generating editable vector/SVG graphics alongside photoreal images, with reusable custom brand styles that need no training.
studio_recraft_recraft_landing_hl0: Editable vector / SVG and icon generation
studio_recraft_recraft_landing_hl1: Custom brand styles without any training
studio_recraft_recraft_landing_hl2: Photoreal images with quality text rendering
studio_reelfarm_reel_farm_slideshow_desc: Generate an AI slideshow video from a natural-language prompt.
studio_reelfarm_reel_farm_slideshow_prom: e.g. A 6-slide motivational slideshow about discipline, bold white text on dark photos…
studio_reelfarm_reel_farm_landing_taglin: AI faceless slideshow videos at scale
studio_reelfarm_reel_farm_landing_desc: Reel.Farm turns a single prompt into a finished TikTok-style slideshow video — slide text, layout, and pacing are all generated for you. Built for bulk, automated short-form content.
studio_reelfarm_reel_farm_landing_hl1: Controls slide count, text, fonts, and layout from the prompt
studio_runway_runway_image_to_video_desc: Animate a source image into a video clip with Runway Gen-4.
studio_runway_runway_text_to_image_desc: Generate a still image from a text prompt with Runway Gen-4.
studio_runway_runway_landing_tagline: Cinematic AI video, built to simulate the world
studio_runway_runway_landing_desc: A pioneering generative-AI platform whose Gen-4 family produces cinematic, high-fidelity video from text and images — prized for consistent characters, scenes, and director-grade motion control.
studio_runway_runway_landing_hl3: Camera and motion controls for cinematic results
studio_runway_runway_landing_hl4: Trusted by filmmakers and creative studios
studio_siliconflow_siliconflow_text_to_i: Generate an image with FLUX, Z-Image and other SiliconFlow models.
studio_siliconflow_siliconflow_text_to_v: Generate a video clip with Wan2.x.
studio_siliconflow_siliconflow_image_to_: Animate a source image with Wan2.x.
studio_siliconflow_siliconflow_text_to_s: Generate a voiceover with Fish-Speech / CosyVoice.
studio_siliconflow_siliconflow_landing_t: One API for all your AI inference needs
studio_siliconflow_siliconflow_landing_d: A lightning-fast inference platform serving 200+ open and commercial models — LLMs plus image, video, and audio — through a single OpenAI-compatible API with predictable pricing.
studio_siliconflow_siliconflow_landing_h: Image, video, and audio generation in one API
studio_openai_sora_text_to_video_desc: Generate a video from a text prompt with OpenAI Sora.
studio_openai_sora_text_to_video_prompt_: Describe the scene — subjects, camera, lighting, motion…
studio_openai_sora_image_to_video_desc: Animate a source image into a video clip with OpenAI Sora.
studio_openai_sora_landing_desc: OpenAI's video model — Sora 2 delivers far more realistic, physically accurate, and controllable video, plus synchronized dialogue and sound effects from a simple text prompt.
studio_openai_sora_landing_hl3: Strong world physics and scene controllability
studio_stability_ai_stability_ai_text_to: Generate a still image from a text prompt with Stable Image.
studio_stability_ai_stability_ai_landing: The company behind Stable Diffusion and the Stable Image models, offering open, enterprise-grade generative media for image creation and editing with full creative control.
Stable Image core, ultra, and SD3 models
Enterprise self-host, API, and managed cloud
Trusted by AWS, Nvidia, Arm, EA, UMG
studio_suno_suno_song_desc: Generate a song with vocals. Add a Style and Title for custom mode, or just describe the song for a quick generation.
studio_suno_suno_song_prompt_placeholder: Describe the song, or paste your own lyrics…
studio_suno_suno_landing_tagline: Generate full songs from a prompt
studio_suno_suno_landing_desc: Suno is a leading generative-AI music model that turns a text prompt — or your own lyrics, style and title — into complete, studio-quality songs with vocals or instrumentals. This studio uses the sunoapi.org gateway.
studio_suno_suno_landing_hl0: Full songs with vocals or instrumental-only
studio_suno_suno_landing_hl1: Custom mode: bring your own lyrics, style and title
studio_suno_suno_landing_hl3: Two takes generated per prompt — keep your favourite
studio_suno_suno_landing_hl4: Tracks land in your audio library, ready to post
studio_tavus_tavus_replica_video_desc: Generate a talking video from one of your Tavus replicas and a script.
studio_tavus_tavus_replica_video_replica: The id of a replica you created in the Tavus dashboard.
studio_tavus_tavus_landing_desc: Tavus builds foundational models for face-to-face AI — real-time video replicas and conversational agents that see, hear, and respond with emotion, via its Phoenix rendering and CVI APIs.
studio_tavus_tavus_landing_hl0: Phoenix-4 real-time human rendering with emotion
studio_tavus_tavus_landing_hl3: CVI APIs to build interactive video agents
studio_togetherai_together_ai_text_to_im: Generate an image with FLUX and other Together image models.
studio_togetherai_together_ai_text_to_vi: Generate a video clip from a text prompt.
studio_togetherai_together_ai_image_to_v: Animate a source image into a video clip.
studio_togetherai_together_ai_text_to_sp: Generate a voiceover with Together text-to-speech.
studio_togetherai_together_ai_landing_ta: The AI-native cloud for open-source models
studio_togetherai_together_ai_landing_de: A full-stack inference cloud serving 200+ open-source models through one API — chat, image, audio, and video — with optimized kernels for faster, cheaper generation at scale.
studio_togetherai_together_ai_landing_hl: Image, video, and audio model support
Up to 2x faster inference with custom kernels
Up to 60% lower cost vs. standard inference
studio_vertex_google_vertex_text_to_vide: Generate a video clip from a text prompt with Google Veo on Vertex.
studio_vertex_google_vertex_text_to_imag: Generate a still image from a text prompt with Google Imagen on Vertex.
studio_vertex_google_vertex_landing_tagl: Enterprise generative media on Google Cloud
studio_vertex_google_vertex_landing_desc: Google Cloud's unified AI platform for building and scaling generative apps — featuring Imagen for photorealistic images and Veo for high-quality text-to-video, with governance built in.

studio_wan_wan_image_to_video_desc: Animate a source image into a video clip with Wan 2.x.

studio_wan_wan_landing_desc: Alibaba's Wan creative platform (Model Studio) lowers the barrier to content creation with the Wan2.x model family — spanning text-to-video, image-to-video, and text-to-image.
studio_wan_wan_landing_hl1: Text-to-image and image editing in one suite
studio_wan_wan_landing_hl3: Strong visual fidelity and motion consistency

studio_xai_xai_grok_landing_hl1: Powered by xAI’s Aurora autoregressive image model
